cat-finisaje.name: Premium finishes
cat-finisaje.description: Tiles, paints, profiles and accessories for flawless finishes.

cat-bai.name: Bathrooms & kitchens
cat-bai.description: Sanitary ware, faucets, worktops and wet-room solutions.

cat-iluminat.name: Lighting
cat-iluminat.description: Architectural fixtures, LED tracks and scene control.

cat-unelte.name: Site tools
cat-unelte.description: Consumables and equipment for PRV teams.

cat-pachete.name: Bundles & consulting
cat-pachete.description: Project bundles and technical consulting hours.

prd-quartz-blanc.name: Alpine White quartz worktop
prd-quartz-blanc.description: Premium quartz worktop for kitchens and bathrooms. Scratch and stain resistant. CNC cut to size — consultation included on orders over 3 m².

prd-faucet-matte.name: Matte Black basin mixer
prd-faucet-matte.shortDescription: Single-lever, water saver, matte black finish.
prd-faucet-matte.description: Premium mixer for basin or sink. 35 mm ceramic cartridge, flex hose included. 5-year manufacturer warranty.

prd-tile-large.name: 120×60 cm porcelain tile
prd-tile-large.description: Large-format tile for living room, bathroom or kitchen. Pallet delivery in Belgium. We recommend PRV-S1 flexible adhesive.

prd-paint-premium.name: Premium interior paint 15 L
prd-paint-premium.shortDescription: Velvet matt, washable, zero VOC on application.
prd-paint-premium.description: Decorative paint for interior walls. Coverage ~12 m²/L. Available in custom shades on request (RAL).

prd-led-profile.name: 2 m aluminium LED profile
prd-led-profile.shortDescription: Recessed, opal diffuser, for 12 mm strip.
prd-led-profile.description: Profile for indirect lighting. End caps included. Compatible with PRV dimmable drivers.

prd-pendant.name: Glass Orbit pendant
prd-pendant.description: Suspended fixture for dining table or kitchen island. Adjustable 1.5 m cable.

prd-level-laser.name: 360° green laser level
prd-level-laser.description: For construction sites and finish installation. 8 h battery life, IP54 rugged housing.

prd-masking-kit.name: Premium masking kit
prd-masking-kit.shortDescription: Tape + film + cutter for a clean job site.
prd-masking-kit.description: Consumable set for protection during finishing work. 2 rolls of tape, 4×5 m film, cutter.

prd-consult-2h.name: 2-hour technical consultation
prd-consult-2h.shortDescription: Video or on-site in Brussels & 30 km.
prd-consult-2h.description: Session with a PRV specialist: materials, construction details, budget optimisation. Digital voucher delivered by email.

prd-bundle-bath.name: Essential bathroom bundle
prd-bundle-bath.description: Bundle for standard bathroom renovations (5–8 m²). Includes 30 min phone consultation.

prd-quartz-blanc|2026-02-10.text: Flawless finish — the PRV team coordinated on-site cutting without any issues.

prd-quartz-blanc|2026-01-18.text: Premium quality, delivered on time. Highly recommended for demanding kitchens.

prd-faucet-matte|2026-03-02.text: Very clean look, easy to install. Pairs perfectly with black finishes.

prd-bundle-bath|2026-02-22.text: Complete package for a small bathroom — clear budget from the start.
